CICD_PROVIDER.description: CI/CD and deployment provider to use

VERCEL_ORG_ID.description: Vercel organization ID (vercel impl only). Store as a GitHub Actions secret.

VERCEL_PROJECT_ID.description: Vercel project ID (vercel impl only). Store as a GitHub Actions secret.

RAILWAY_PROJECT_ID.description: Railway project ID (railway impl only). Store as a GitHub Actions secret.

COMPLIANCE_POSTURE.description: Compliance posture driving which CI/CD additions are generated (§28). solo=baseline only, startup=adds Dependabot/Trivy/PR template/coverage, enterprise=full suite including SBOM/cosign/CODEOWNERS.

notes: Config files (vercel.json, railway.toml) and workflow files are generated at project scaffold time. All secrets are stored as GitHub Actions secrets, not in .env. COMPLIANCE_POSTURE controls which additional CI/CD jobs and .github/ templates are scaffolded.
